HTML and text templates for testing various Flask template features, including macros, autoescaping, and filters.

## Folders
- **[nested](nested/README.md)**: A text file with the content "I'm nested".

## Files
- **[_macro.html](_macro.html.md)**: Defines a macro to display a greeting message with a given name.
- **[context_template.html](context_template.html.md)**: HTML template for displaying a value and an injected value using Flask's template syntax.
- **[escaping_template.html](escaping_template.html.md)**: HTML template for testing autoescaping behavior in Flask.
- **[mail.txt](mail.txt.md)**: Template for rendering mail with a placeholder for "foo".
- **[non_escaping_template.txt](non_escaping_template.txt.md)**: A template file for testing autoescaping behavior in Flask templates.
- **[simple_template.html](simple_template.html.md)**: An HTML template that displays a variable named "whiskey" inside an h1 tag.
- **[template_filter.html](template_filter.html.md)**: HTML template that applies a custom filter `super_reverse` to a variable `value`.
- **[template_test.html](template_test.html.md)**: HTML template for testing boolean value rendering in Flask.
